thought.text: Now I need to update the token mapping in main.cpp to include all the new tokens:

action.old_str:
// 映射定义，将ANTLR的tokenTypeName映射到clang的格式
std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> tokenTypeMapping = {
  { "Int", "int" },
  { "Identifier", "identifier" },
  { "LeftParen", "l_paren" },
  { "RightParen", "r_paren" },
  { "RightBrace", "r_brace" },
  { "LeftBrace", "l_brace" },
  { "LeftBracket", "l_square" },
  { "RightBracket", "r_square" },
  { "Constant", "numeric_constant" },
  { "Return", "return" },
  { "Semi", "semi" },
  { "EOF", "eof" },
  { "Equal", "equal" },
  { "Plus", "plus" },
  { "Comma", "comma" },

  // 在这里继续添加其他映射
};
action.new_str:
// 映射定义，将ANTLR的tokenTypeName映射到clang的格式
std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> tokenTypeMapping = {
  // Keywords
  { "Int", "int" },
  { "Return", "return" },
  { "If", "if" },
  { "Else", "else" },
  { "While", "while" },
  { "For", "for" },
  { "Break", "break" },
  { "Continue", "continue" },
  { "Void", "void" },

  { "Switch", "switch" },
  { "Case", "case" },
  { "Default", "default" },
  { "Do", "do" },
  { "Goto", "goto" },

  // Identifiers and constants
  { "Identifier", "identifier" },

  // Punctuators
  { "LeftParen", "l_paren" },
  { "RightParen", "r_paren" },
  { "LeftBracket", "l_square" },
  { "RightBracket", "r_square" },

  { "Slash", "slash" },
  { "Percent", "percent" },

  { "EqualEqual", "equalequal" },

  { "Caret", "caret" },

  { "AmpersandAmpersand", "ampersandampersand" },
  { "Question", "question" },
  { "Colon", "colon" },
  { "Equal", "equal" },
  { "PlusEqual", "plusequal" },
  { "MinusEqual", "minusequal" },
  { "StarEqual", "starequal" },
  { "SlashEqual", "slashequal" },
  { "PercentEqual", "percentequal" },
  { "LessLessEqual", "lesslessequal" },
  { "GreaterGreaterEqual", "greatergreaterequal" },
  { "AmpersandEqual", "ampersandequal" },
  { "CaretEqual", "caretequal" },
  { "PipeEqual", "pipeequal" },

  // Special
  { "EOF", "eof" }
};
